title: CRC-32 IEEE 802.3 / zlib / gzip (reflected, LSB-first)
signature: pub fn crc32(seed: u32, buf: &[u8]) -> u32
notes: This is THE CRC-32 used by zlib, gzip, PNG, Ethernet. Polynomial 0xEDB88320 is the bit-reversed form of 0x04C11DB7 — it MUST be used with LSB-first traversal (shift right, XOR on low bit). Mixing it with MSB-first traversal (shift left, check high bit) produces garbage. Initial value 0xFFFFFFFF, final XOR 0xFFFFFFFF. Use seed=0 to start fresh.

title: CRC-32 non-reflected (MSB-first with 0x04C11DB7)
signature: pub fn crc32_msb(seed: u32, buf: &[u8]) -> u32
notes: Non-reflected CRC-32 variant. Polynomial 0x04C11DB7, MSB-first. NOT what zlib / gzip / PNG use — those use the reflected variant above. Include this only when the spec specifically calls for MSB-first CRC-32.
